findings.search_query: Dr. John Taylor Gilman 1806 1903 Concord New Hampshire physician Nathaniel Gilman Dorothy Folsom
findings.source_title: John Taylor Gilman (1806-1884) - FamilySearch Family Tree
findings.snippet: FamilySearch Family Tree profile titled 'john-taylor-gilman-1806-1884' returned for a John Taylor Gilman born 1806; page body not retrievable (FamilySearch blocks automated fetch), but URL slug encodes name and life span 1806-1884.
findings.claimed_facts: A FamilySearch profile exists for John Taylor Gilman b. 1806, d. 1884. Confirms the 1806 birth in worklist; the death year differs (FamilySearch=1884 vs worklist=1903).
findings.notes: CONFLICT: worklist death 23 Feb 1903 vs FamilySearch slug 1884. Distinct person from the famous Gov. John Taylor Gilman (1753-1828) of Exeter (Wikipedia), who he was likely named after. Profile body not verified - URL match only. Needs human verification of which death year is correct.

findings.search_query: Robert Lord Ipswich 1657 1735 Abigail Ayer Haverhill
findings.source_title: Ayer Family | Rocks Village in Haverhill, Massachusetts
findings.snippet: "born 4 July 1664 in Haverhill" ... "married Robert Lord of Ipswich, Massachusetts, on 7 June 1681". Robert Lord "son of Robert and Hannah (Day) Lord", "born 26 December 1657".
findings.claimed_facts: Abigail Ayer born 4 Jul 1664 Haverhill (matches worklist). Married Robert Lord of Ipswich 7 Jun 1681. Per this source her parents were Cornet Peter Ayer and Hannah Allen.
findings.notes: Birth date/place match worklist exactly. CONFLICT on parentage: worklist lists father 'Obadiah Ayers Sr' but this Ayer-family source names parents Cornet Peter Ayer and Hannah Allen. Death date (29 Jul 1742 Ipswich per worklist) not given on this page.

findings.search_query: Robert Lord Ipswich physician 1657 1735 Hannah Day Abigail Ayer
findings.source_title: Robert Lord Jr. (1657-1735) - FamilySearch Family Tree / Ayer Family, Rocks Village
findings.snippet: FamilySearch slug 'robert-lord-jr.-1657-1735' (b.1657 d.1735). Rocks Village Ayer page: Robert Lord 'born 26 December 1657', 'son of Robert and Hannah (Day) Lord', married Abigail Ayer 7 June 1681.
findings.claimed_facts: Robert Lord born 26 Dec 1657, died 1735, son of Robert Lord and Hannah Day, husband of Abigail Ayer (m. 1681). Dates and parents match worklist.
findings.notes: Birth/death/parents/spouse all match worklist. CAVEAT: worklist titles him 'Dr Robert Lord' but the Rocks Village source did not state a physician occupation (a related Ayer-family search returned a description of a Robert Lord as a blacksmith). 'Dr' title unverified.

findings.search_query: Benjamin Tibbetts Dover NH 1700 1761 Lebanon Maine Abigail wife
findings.source_title: Benjamin Tibbetts (1700-1761) | WikiTree
findings.snippet: "Husband of Abigail (Unknown) Tibbetts" (b. 1705-09-02); "married before 1725 in Dover, Strafford, Province of New Hampshire".
findings.claimed_facts: Abigail, wife of Capt Benjamin Tibbetts, has recorded birth 2 Sep 1705 (matches worklist's 2 Sep 1705 Dover NH). Married Benjamin before 1725 in Dover.
findings.notes: Birth date matches worklist exactly. CAVEAT: WikiTree lists her maiden name as Unknown, so worklist's surname 'Tibbetts' and parents (Capt. Thomas Tibbetts; Judith Dam) are not confirmed by WikiTree. Possible Tibbetts-Tibbetts cousin marriage per worklist but unverified.

findings.search_query: Benjamin Tibbetts Dover NH 1700 1761 Lebanon Maine Abigail
findings.source_title: Benjamin Tibbetts (1700-1761) | WikiTree
findings.snippet: "Born 31 Oct 1700 in Dover Point, Dover, Strafford, Province of New Hampshire"; "Died 30 Jun 1761 at age 60 in Lebanon, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony"; son of Henry Tibbetts and Joyce (Unknown) Tibbetts; "Husband of Abigail (Unknown) Tibbetts".
findings.claimed_facts: Benjamin Tibbetts born 31 Oct 1700 Dover NH; died 30 Jun 1761 Lebanon (York Co.); son of Henry Tibbetts and Joyce; husband of Abigail. All match worklist.
findings.notes: Birth date/place, death date/place, parents (Henry Tibbetts; Joyce Otis), and wife Abigail all match the worklist. Find a Grave memorial #39433174 and Geni and FamilySearch (L5DN-PSL) also exist for the same person.

findings.search_query: Amiable Blake 1706 Wrentham Massachusetts Abraham York John Blake Joanna Whiting
findings.source_title: Re: Blake/Harris Wrentham MA - Genealogy.com forum
findings.snippet: "Amiable Blake was born on 25 October 1706" and "John Blake married Joanna Whiting on 6 February 1689 in Wrentham, Massachusetts"; Amiable was a child of John and Joanna, all born in Wrentham.
findings.claimed_facts: Amiable Blake born 25 Oct 1706 Wrentham MA, daughter of John Blake and Joanna Whiting. Matches worklist birth date, place, and parents.
findings.notes: Birth date/place and parents match worklist. Spouse 'Abraham York' not confirmed in this source. Source is a user-contributed forum post (web tree quality).

findings.search_query: Joseph Philbrick deacon Hampton NH 1694 1761 Elizabeth Perkins
findings.source_title: A genealogy of the Philbrick and Philbrook families (Chapman) / Geni
findings.snippet: Joseph Philbrick "born February 3, 1694, and died December 2, 1761," a Deacon, son of James. Married "second, November 26, 1719, Elizabeth, daughter of James Perkins".
findings.claimed_facts: Deacon Joseph Philbrick born 3 Feb 1694, died 2 Dec 1761, of Hampton NH; second wife Elizabeth Perkins (m. 26 Nov 1719). Matches worklist dates and spouse.
findings.notes: Birth/death dates and spouse Elizabeth Perkins match worklist. Corroborated by published Chapman 'Genealogy of the Philbrick and Philbrook families' on archive.org. Note Joseph had three wives (Anne Dearborn 1717, Elizabeth Perkins 1719, Sarah Nay 1736).

findings.search_query: Ebenezer Stone Watertown 1663 1754 Newton deacon Margaret Trowbridge
findings.source_title: Ebenezer Stone (1663-1754) | WikiTree / Geni
findings.snippet: "Ebenezer Stone was born 27 February 1662/3 in Watertown, Middlesex County Massachusetts ... son of Simon Stone and Mary Whipple ... married first Margaret Trowbridge ... on 18 March 1685/6 in Newton." Served as deacon, selectman, representative, councillor 1730-1734, justice of the peace; died 1754.
findings.claimed_facts: Ebenezer Stone born 27 Feb 1662/3 Watertown MA; died 1754 Newton; deacon and esquire (justice/councillor); married Margaret Trowbridge 18 Mar 1685/6. Matches worklist.
findings.notes: Birth date/place, death year/place, spouse, and the 'Honorable/Deacon/Esquire' titles all align with worklist. Parents given by sources as Simon Stone and Mary Whipple (worklist parents blank). Two genealogy sites agree.

findings.search_query: Elizabeth Langdon 1656 Portsmouth NH Tobias Langdon Sherburne Kittery
findings.source_title: Tobias Langdon (1631-1664) | WikiTree / Geni
findings.snippet: Tobias Langdon married Elizabeth Sherburne 10 Jun 1656 in Portsmouth NH; their children included "Elizabeth (Langdon) Fernald, Margaret (Langdon) Morrill, Tobias Langdon Jr. and Oner (Langdon) Leighton."
findings.claimed_facts: Elizabeth Langdon, daughter of Tobias Langdon and Elizabeth Sherburne of Portsmouth NH, married into the Fernald family (Elizabeth (Langdon) Fernald). Parents match worklist.
findings.notes: Parents (Tobias Langdon; Elizabeth Sherburne) match worklist. CAVEAT: the date '1656' in worklist may be conflated with parents' marriage date (10 Jun 1656); the daughter Elizabeth (Langdon) Fernald who died in Kittery is the worklist person. Daughter's exact birth year and death (11 May 1740 Kittery) not directly confirmed in snippet - needs verification.

findings.search_query: Joseph Philbrick Hampton NH Elizabeth Perkins 1693 1736 James Perkins
findings.source_title: A genealogy of the Philbrick and Philbrook families (Chapman) / Geni
findings.snippet: Joseph Philbrick married "second, November 26, 1719, Elizabeth, daughter of James Perkins"; "Elizabeth Perkins was born 1693-4 and died March 26, 1736."
findings.claimed_facts: Elizabeth Perkins born 1693/4 (worklist 1693), died 26 Mar 1736 (matches worklist exactly), daughter of James Perkins of Hampton NH, wife of Deacon Joseph Philbrick.
findings.notes: Birth year, exact death date (26 Mar 1736), and spouse match worklist. CONFLICT/NOTE: this source names her father James Perkins; worklist lists parent 'Leah Coxe Perkins' (a mother). Father James Perkins not in worklist.

findings.search_query: Getchell 1710 Salisbury Massachusetts 1778 Machias Maine Moses Getchell Abiel Sprague
findings.source_title: Hannah (Getchell) Sprague (1710-1788) | WikiTree / Geni
findings.snippet: "Hannah (Getchell) Sprague was born on September 22, 1710 in Salisbury, Essex County, Massachusetts ... married to Abiel Sprague ... daughter of Moses Getchell and Judith Unknown." Died in Machias, Washington County, Maine (Geni/Geneanet 16 Oct 1778; WikiTree 1788).
findings.claimed_facts: The unnamed worklist 'Getchell' is Hannah Getchell, born 22 Sep 1710 Salisbury MA, daughter of Moses Getchell and Judith, wife of Abiel Sprague, died Machias ME. Matches worklist (birth, parents, spouse, death place).
findings.notes: Strong match - worklist simply lacks her first name 'Hannah'. CONFLICT on death year: worklist & Geni/Geneanet = 16 Oct 1778; WikiTree = 1788. Spouse 'Abiel/Abial Sprague Sr' matches worklist.

findings.search_query: Ebenezer Stone Margaret Trowbridge 1666 1710 Newton James Trowbridge Margaret Atherton
findings.source_title: Margaret (Trowbridge) Stone (1666-1710) | WikiTree
findings.snippet: Ebenezer Stone "married first Margaret Trowbridge, daughter of James Trowbridge and Margaret Atherton, on 18 March 1685/6 in Newton. Margaret died 4 May 1710 at age 44 in Newton, Massachusetts."
findings.claimed_facts: Margaret Atherton Trowbridge, daughter of James Trowbridge and Margaret Atherton, married Ebenezer Stone 18 Mar 1685/6 in Newton; died 4 May 1710 Newton (matches worklist death). Born ~1666 (matches worklist 30 Apr 1666).
findings.notes: Birth year ~1666, death 4 May 1710 Newton, spouse Ebenezer Stone, and mother Margaret Atherton all match worklist. Father James Trowbridge identified by source. Note: this person also appears separately in the worklist (lower priority batch).

findings.search_query: William Towers Tower Hill St David New Brunswick 1750 1835 Ann Staples
findings.source_title: Category: Saint David Parish, New Brunswick / Towers Genealogy - WikiTree
findings.snippet: WikiTree Saint David Parish category lists a Towers family at Tower Hill, e.g. "Mary (Towers) Bradshaw 12 Apr 1873 Tower Hill, Saint David, Charlotte, New Brunswick". A William Towers b. before 24 Feb 1751 Bothkennar Stirlingshire d. 11 Jan 1835 is referenced.
findings.claimed_facts: A Towers family is documented at Tower Hill, Saint David Parish, Charlotte Co., New Brunswick; a William Towers born ~24 Feb 1750/51 Bothkennar, Stirlingshire, died 11 Jan 1835 is referenced, consistent with worklist.
findings.notes: Place (Tower Hill, St David, Charlotte Co NB) and the Bothkennar origin + 1835 death are corroborated indirectly, but no single verified profile retrieved. Tower Hill, Charlotte Co. (St David) is distinct from Tower Hill Cemetery in Saint John. Spouse Ann Staples not confirmed online. Needs direct profile/record.

findings.search_query: Daniel Fairfield 1702 Ipswich Massachusetts Remember Stevens Walter Fairfield
findings.source_title: Fairfield Genealogy / Walter Fairfield Sr. (abt.1631-1723) | WikiTree
findings.snippet: A WikiTree profile for Daniel Fairfield born 30 April 1702 in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts (died after 1741) exists. Walter Fairfield Sr. (c.1631-1723) of Wenham is documented as a Fairfield patriarch.
findings.claimed_facts: Daniel Fairfield born 30 Apr 1702 Ipswich MA (matches worklist birth exactly); part of the Walter Fairfield family of Essex Co.
findings.notes: Birth date/place match worklist. Spouse 'Remember Stevens' and death (25 Jan 1745 Boston) NOT confirmed in results; one source gave death 'after 1741'. Father Walter Fairfield Jr per worklist plausible given the Walter Fairfield family but not directly verified.

findings.search_query: Martha Files 1823 Thorndike Maine Joseph Files Fernald Troy Waldo
findings.source_title: Joseph Fernald (1812-1862) - Find a Grave Memorial #30126518
findings.snippet: Find a Grave memorial for a Joseph Fernald (1812-1862) in the Thorndike/Waldo Co., Maine area appeared in results; full page blocked (HTTP 403). Thorndike Center Cemetery (Waldo Co.) is the likely burial area for Martha Files (b.1823).
findings.claimed_facts: Possible association of Martha Files (b.1823 Thorndike) with the Fernald family of Waldo Co., ME; she married Jonathan F. Fernald Jr. per worklist.
findings.notes: Find a Grave page returned 403 and could not be read; only the search snippet (Thorndike/Fernald context) is available. The Joseph Fernald found (1812-1862) is likely a relative, not necessarily her husband Jonathan F. Fernald Jr. Needs direct Find a Grave lookup by a human.

findings.search_query: Mary Bearne 1753 1810 Bovey Tracey Devon Edward Rowe marriage
findings.source_title: ROWE - Bovey Tracey Parish records (Devon) - RootsChat.Com / GENUKI Bovey Tracey
findings.snippet: Bovey Tracey marriage registers (1754-1837) are indexed (GENUKI, archive.org 'Devonshire parish registers. Marriages'); a RootsChat thread discusses Rowe family Bovey Tracey parish records. No specific Mary Bearne x Edward Rowe entry surfaced.
findings.claimed_facts: Bovey Tracey, Devon parish marriage registers covering the relevant 1770s period exist and are partly online, and a Rowe family is documented in Bovey Tracey; no specific record for Mary Bearne (d. 1810 Bovey Tracey) marrying Edward Rowe was located in free sources.
findings.notes: NO direct hit. Suggest a human check the Bovey Tracey parish registers on FamilySearch (free) for a Bearne-Rowe marriage and a Mary Rowe nee Bearne burial c.1810. Surname may be spelled Bearne/Bearn/Bearns.

findings.search_query: Hannah Gerrish Cromwell Simon Cromwell Maine 1816 1891 Joseph Gerrish Lydia
findings.source_title: Cromwell Genealogy / various - no direct match
findings.snippet: Searches for Hannah Gerrish Cromwell (1816-1891, wife of Simon Cromwell, daughter of Joseph Gerrish and Lydia) did not surface a specific verified profile; a Simon Cromwell Jr. (1822-1885) on Find a Grave is a different/related person.
findings.claimed_facts: No verified record located for Hannah Gerrish Cromwell.
findings.notes: NO direct hit in free sources. A Simon Cromwell Jr. (1822-1885, Find a Grave #50640911) exists but dates differ from her husband (worklist Simon b.1813). Recommend human search Find a Grave / FamilySearch for Hannah Gerrish b.~1816 ME d. 21 Jan 1891.

findings.search_query: Levi Bagley Troy Waldo Maine Jonathan Bagley Eunice Read Abigail Coombs
findings.source_title: Marriage records of Waldo County, Maine prior to 1892 (archive.org) / Bagley family records
findings.snippet: Searches confirmed the Jonathan Bagley + Eunice Read family of Troy, Waldo Co., Maine (e.g. John Bagley b. 22 Apr 1810 Troy to Jonathan Bagley and Eunice Read), but no specific record for a son Levi H Bagley married to Abigail Coombs surfaced.
findings.claimed_facts: The parent family (Jonathan Bagley & Eunice Read of Troy, Waldo Co. ME) is corroborated; a sibling John Bagley b.1810 Troy is documented. Levi H Bagley himself not directly found.
findings.notes: NO direct hit on Levi himself. Parents (Jonathan Bagley; Eunice Read) and birthplace (Troy, Waldo Co.) corroborated via sibling records. Note a contemporaneous John Bagley (1810-1871) of Troy could be confused with Levi (both b.~1810). Check Waldo Co. marriage records (archive.org) for Levi Bagley x Abigail Coombs.

findings.source_title: Danforth, Washington County, Maine genealogy resources - no direct match
findings.snippet: No specific record located for Nora E Danforth (b. Oct 1853 ME, wife of Otis J Danforth, daughter of Chester B Gerry and Martha Gerry).
findings.claimed_facts: No verified record located for Nora E Danforth.
findings.notes: NO direct hit in free sources. NOTE a possible worklist inconsistency: spouse listed as 'Otis J Danforth' (same surname as subject) while parents are Gerry - so Danforth is likely her married name. Recommend human search 1900 census (Maine) for Otis & Nora Danforth and Find a Grave.

findings.search_query: Simon Cromwell 1813 Damariscotta Maine 1887 Hannah Gerrish John Cromwell findagrave
findings.source_title: Cromwell family Maine records - no direct match
findings.source_site: Find a Grave (different person) / WikiTree Cromwell index
findings.snippet: A Find a Grave memorial for Simon Cromwell Jr. (22 May 1822-3 Oct 1885) exists, but dates differ from worklist's Simon Cromwell (b.1813 Damariscotta, d.12 Dec 1887). No verified profile matching the worklist person was found.
findings.claimed_facts: No verified record located for the worklist Simon Cromwell (b.1813 Damariscotta ME).
findings.notes: NO direct match. The Find a Grave Simon Cromwell Jr. (1822-1885) is a DIFFERENT person (dates differ ~9 yrs from worklist). Recommend human verify parents (John Cromwell & Elizabeth Van Deusen - a New York Cromwell line) vs the Maine/Damariscotta birthplace, which seem potentially inconsistent.
